steps.title: Identify what needs to be contrasted
steps.content: The student's goal is explicit: contrast the number of haiku in each poem. The notes provide the relevant facts — one poem has five haiku, the other has fifteen.

steps.title: Find the choice that sets up the contrast
steps.content: Choice B directly states the haiku count for each poem and uses “whereas” to show the contrast — five versus fifteen. The other three choices discuss themes, subjects, or collection information rather than numerical quantities. That matches choice B — B is correct.
